exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT
 CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END as AgentId,
 SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity AS FLOAT) * CAST(oi.UnitPrice AS FLOAT)) as TotalSales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON (CASE WHEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),2) ELSE trim(oi.OrderId) END) = (CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.Id),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.Id),2) ELSE trim(o.Id) END)
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT
 CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END as AgentId,
 SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity AS FLOAT) * CAST(oi.UnitPrice AS FLOAT)) as TotalSales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON (CASE WHEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),2) ELSE trim(oi.OrderId) END) = (CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.Id),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.Id),2) ELSE trim(o.Id) END)
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
LIMIT 1;
